nodes.title: Concurrency test B: add logging to experiment runner
nodes.description: Test issue B — created immediately after issue A. The webhook for this should hit the DynamoDB lock and return "Active" (skipped), since the first webhook already claimed the lock.

nodes.title: Concurrency test A: add retry logic to eval.py runner
nodes.description: Test issue A — created to verify per-project concurrency control. Should trigger a webhook that acquires the DynamoDB lock and invokes AgentCore.

nodes.title: Run autoresearch experiment 03-data-cleaning with 2 cycles (repeat)
nodes.description:
Run experiment 03-data-cleaning with 2 evaluation cycles.

Use `/autoresearch run 03-data-cleaning --cycles 2` to execute.

*This issue was created by the E2E integration test.*

nodes.title: Run autoresearch experiment 03-data-cleaning with 5 cycles (per-cycle comments test)
nodes.description:
Run experiment 03-data-cleaning with 5 optimization cycles to validate per-cycle progress comments.

Use `/autoresearch run 03-data-cleaning --cycles 5` to execute.

**What to verify:**

* A progress comment is posted after **every cycle** (cycles 0–5), not just at the end
* Each comment includes the running recap table with all cycles so far
* The final "Reporting Results" summary comment is also posted at the end

The per-cycle comment format is defined in the `## Progress Updates` section of the autoresearch [SKILL.md](<http://SKILL.md>).

nodes.title: Run autoresearch experiment 02-llm-prompt-opt with 5 cycles
nodes.description:
Run experiment 02-llm-prompt-opt with 5 evaluation cycles and post results to this issue as a comment.

Use `/autoresearch run 02-llm-prompt-opt --cycles 5` to execute.

After the experiment completes, post a results comment on this issue (MOR-5) following the Reporting Results format in the autoresearch [SKILL.md](<http://SKILL.md>) — include score progression table, best configuration commit, branch name, and output files.
